api.description: Base URL of the AuthProxy API service (e.g. http://localhost:8081).

admin_api.description: Base URL of the AuthProxy Admin API service (e.g. http://localhost:8082).

auth.description: Base URL of the AuthProxy auth/public service (e.g. http://localhost:8080).

marketplace.description: Base URL of the marketplace UI (e.g. http://localhost:5173).

admin_ui.description: Base URL of the admin UI (e.g. http://localhost:5174).

Server.description: URLs the CLI uses to reach the various AuthProxy services. Each may be a direct string or any of the StringValue variants (env var, file, etc.).

admin_username.description: Username/actor id used when signing admin JWTs.

admin_private_key_path.description: Path to the RSA/EC private key used to sign admin JWTs.

admin_shared_key_path.description: Path to the shared (HMAC) secret used to sign admin JWTs. Mutually exclusive with admin_private_key_path.

Root.description: Root of the CLI config file (typically ~/.authproxy.yaml).
